rationale: Review 2's points (lemma naming+prime+mixed case; field snake vs camelCase inconsistency with finiteType/geomReduced) are directly visible in the diff, unambiguously real for the naming rubric, and fix issues any maintainer would accept; acting on them measurably improves consistency. Review 1's Is*-prefix renames, AlgPoints generalization, and stub-field renames are either debatable conventions or change more than needed (IsUnipotent is a def not a parallel class), so its PR ends up with the intra-file casing flaw unaddressed.
